intro: Pleonotoma albiflora is a plant species native to the tropical regions of South America, belonging to the family Annonaceae. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly for its potential in treating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its anti-inflammatory and expectorant properties. Bioactive constituents of Pleonotoma albiflora include annonaceous acetogenins, which have been reported to exhibit antioxidant, anticancer, and antimicrobial activities. Traditionally, Pleonotoma albiflora is used in herbal preparations, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are used to relieve respiratory symptoms and support overall well-being.
